title: CAST AI Rebalancing Schedule
description: A Rebalancing Schedule defines a recurring job that periodically optimizes cluster node allocation for cost efficiency.

id.description: Unique identifier for the rebalancing schedule.

clusterId.description: ID of the cluster this schedule applies to.

schedule.description: Cron expression defining when rebalancing runs.

enabled.description: Whether the rebalancing schedule is active.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the schedule was created.
